name: zeke-bar-mitzvah-mcp
description: MCP server exposing logistics for Zeke's Bar Mitzvah, May 9 2026.

tools.name: get_schedule
tools.description: Returns the full day-of schedule (service, kiddush, reception) with start/end times, locations, and attire.

tools.name: get_directions
tools.description: Returns parking and walking directions to a named event.

event.description: Which event to get directions to.

tools.name: get_dress_code
tools.description: Returns the dress code for a named event.

tools.name: get_oncall_contact
tools.description: Returns the day-of on-call contact (Gabi). Text first if you need help.

tools.name: check_in_at_phone_drop
tools.description: Confirms a teenager has handed in their phone at the reception door. Honor system. Returns a confirmation message and a blessing.

name.description: Name of the teenager checking in.

resources.name: Logistics JSON
resources.description: Canonical structured data for the day.

resources.name: Markdown
resources.description: Clean markdown copy of the page (served as text/plain so Jekyll keeps it verbatim).
